name: TÅGFORDON door mat
description: TÅGFORDON Door mat - black/dot pattern 2 ' 0 "x2 ' 11 ". Coir is a strong, durable fiber which is ideal for doormats. The coir fiber used for this doormat comes from coconut waste, a natural choice for the planet. The backing keeps the door mat firmly in place. Recommended for indoor use only.
